title: Modded Gallery Compat
description: This pack adds item textures for several mods' paintings to use with Gallery
body:
Gallery adds icons for each vanilla painting plus quality-of-life features. This resource pack adds compat for various mods that add paintings: Carbasa, Supplementaries, Dark Paintings, Sully's Mod, Alex's Mobs, Jaden's Nether Expansion, Bountiful Fares, Enderscape and NewWorld.

![Carbasa adds 33 paintings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27ba7654089fdc4556c87d45bf256b0a7779ca6f.png)

This pack began as compat for Portfolio; the latest 1.21.1 version now has built-in compatibility with Gallery.

![This pack was originally made to add compat with Portfolio](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d4afdd6561098db3cb9c88dd5dd939ceb38eca3.png)

For compat with Medieval Paintings, TooManyPaintings and Macaw's Paintings, check out [Abnormals Gallery Compat](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/abnormals-gallery-compat).
